entities.description: am16 saradc ino boot is a signal that  when grounded  triggers the cpu to enter maskrom mode for firmware upgrades
usb3 1 otg is an interface used for firmware upgrades when the cpu is in maskrom mode
maskrom mode is a cpu mode entered when the am16 saradc ino boot signal is detected as a low level

relations.description: the am16 saradc ino boot signal being grounded causes the cpu to enter maskrom mode
the am16 saradc ino boot signal being grounded enables the firmware upgrade process
the usb3 1 otg interface is used for firmware upgrades when the cpu is in maskrom mode
the cpu enters maskrom mode to allow firmware upgrades via the usb3 1 otg interface
